# gstack-antigravity

> A toolkit of 25 AI personas for non-technical founders to build software via natural language.

## Core Workflows
- [Setup Instructions](https://github.com/kimjin8/gstack-antigravity#setup): How to give your AI "Eyes."
- [3-Step Timeline](https://github.com/kimjin8/gstack-antigravity#timeline): Plan, Build, and Check phases.
- [Persona List](/gstack-source/specialists): Descriptions of all 25 digital specialists.

## Key Commands
- `/office-hours`: Brainstorming and strategy with a YC-style partner.
- `/gstack`: Automated building and browser-based coding.
- `/qa`: Visual bug finding and automated testing.

## Technical Notes
- Built for Antigravity.
- Derived from Garry Tan's gstack.
- Features "Safety Guards" to prevent broken code deployments.
